title: polypodium phyllomanes
intro: Polypodium phyllomanes is a type of fern commonly known as the rock cap fern, which belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Polypodium phyllomanes include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, Polypodium phyllomanes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
